line: I am willing to discuss this without insults.
consequence: If the insults continue, I will end the conversation.
delivery: Low voice, one sentence, no extra defense.

line: I do not agree with that version of events.
consequence: I will pause this discussion if you keep demanding agreement.
delivery: Neutral tone. Do not argue every detail.

line: No. That does not work for me.
consequence: I will make my own decision and step away now.
delivery: Let the silence after 'no' do some work.

line: Talk about the assignment, not me.
consequence: If the personal comments continue, I will involve the teacher or safeguarding lead.
delivery: Say it where a responsible adult can hear if safe.

line: Please keep feedback specific to my work.
consequence: I will document personal remarks and raise the pattern through the proper channel.
delivery: Professional, factual, and preferably in writing.

line: I am not available for personal attacks.
consequence: Further messages will be muted, blocked, and reported.
delivery: Do not announce the consequence more than once.

line: I will not stay in a conversation where I am being mocked.
consequence: I am leaving the room and we can try again later.
delivery: Choose a safe exit before speaking.

line: I answered that already.
consequence: I will not repeat myself to satisfy pressure.
delivery: Use the same words each time.

line: That was not the agreement I received.
consequence: I will refer to the written decision before proceeding.
delivery: Bring the conversation back to records.

line: You do not have permission to share my private information.
consequence: I will preserve evidence and report any disclosure.
delivery: Do not reveal what evidence you have.

line: Please send that request and deadline in writing.
consequence: I will work from the documented priority order.
delivery: Matter-of-fact, without accusing anyone of dishonesty.

line: I am not available for comments about my body or private life.
consequence: If it happens again, I will document and report it.
delivery: Direct, brief, and preferably with a witness nearby.

line: I can discuss performance using specific examples.
consequence: I will pause if the discussion returns to labels or rumors.
delivery: Keep notes and ask for dates, tasks, and expected outcomes.

line: Do not post photos or messages about me without permission.
consequence: I will save the post and report it if it stays up.
delivery: Use writing when possible so the request is recorded.

line: I will not share my answers or do your assignment.
consequence: I am leaving this chat if you keep asking.
delivery: No apology and no long explanation.

line: You may disagree with me; you may not mock me during class.
consequence: I will involve the teacher if it continues.
delivery: Steady voice, then follow through quietly.

line: I am not discussing this while people are shouting.
consequence: I will leave the room and return when it is calm.
delivery: Choose an exit you can safely use.

line: My phone and messages are private.
consequence: I will change access and passwords if they are checked without permission.
delivery: State the practical action, not a threat.

line: I will decide what personal news I share and when.
consequence: I will stop giving updates if they are passed on without permission.
delivery: Keep the sentence focused on your information.

line: Do not tag me in harassment or pile-ons.
consequence: I will block, report, and preserve the messages.
delivery: Do not debate after sending it.

line: I do not move private conversations to apps with disappearing messages.
consequence: We can continue here or not continue.
delivery: Treat resistance as useful information.

line: I will not prove my identity with private photos or documents.
consequence: I am ending contact if you keep requesting them.
delivery: Never bargain with intimate images or account credentials.

line: I need time before answering.
consequence: If you pressure me, my answer will be no.
delivery: Take the time without asking permission for it.

line: Do not use things I shared in confidence as ammunition.
consequence: I will stop sharing personal information with you.
delivery: Name the behavior and the access it will cost.

line: I am not responsible for managing your reaction to my no.
consequence: I will leave if the reaction becomes insulting or threatening.
delivery: Keep your exit path in mind before saying it.
